narrative:
Precinct Warren Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 761 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
